context_after.description: Lines to include after each match (rg -A); default: 0; max: 50.

context_before.description: Lines to include before each match (rg -B); default: 0; max: 50.

multiline.description: When true the regex '.' matches newlines (RE2 (?s) flag); default: false.

path.description: File or directory to search. Relative paths resolve against the session cwd. When a directory

pattern.description: RE2 regular expression to search for. RE2 does not support lookaheads or backreferences.
